title: Benchmarking Reveals Superiority of Deep Learning Variant Callers on Bacterial Nanopore Sequence Data
notes: Systematic benchmark of 7 variant callers across 14 bacterial species, 3 basecalling models, 2 read types. Dense quantitative results with F1/precision/recall tables. Tests ability to present multi-factorial comparison (caller x model x read type x species) and nuanced error analysis.
